requirements_met.requirement: Provide a versioned historical export endpoint

requirements_met.evidence: Default limit=100, max_limit=1000, enforced via min(limit, max_limit)

requirements_met.requirement: Include both session summary and per-call event data
requirements_met.evidence: Response contains sessions[] and events[] arrays

requirements_met.requirement: Handle empty results and unavailable stores
requirements_met.evidence: 503 for store=None, 200 with empty arrays for no data
format=csv returns text/csv with stdlib csv module
Bounded SQL with LIMIT, no load_all() for events
422 for invalid limit, 400 for unsupported format
README has export section, 24 focused tests
